title: ‘Ghayal Hu, Isiliye Ghatak Hu’: Raghav Chadha Takes ‘Dhurandhar’ Jibe At AAP In Latest Video
description: In his latest video message posted on X, Aam Aadmi Party MP Raghav Chadha gave a three-point rebuttal to AAP’s three allegations. Calling them a ‘scripted campaign’ and ‘coordinated attack’ at him, Chadha said he has been forced to break silence as people may begin to believe in lies if they are repeated several times.
